name: Make it standard using sheet actions reference
description: User says 'make it standard' — AI uses sheet-actions.yaml reference to apply correct formatting

context.current_state: Sheet has content but formatting is inconsistent

expected_actions.reason: Step 1: Remove all existing borders from task rows (from sheet-actions.yaml make_standard sequence)
Step 2: Apply standard gray borders to task rows (error_prevention rule: task rows must have gray #CCCCCC, not black)
Step 3: Remove borders from timeline area (error_prevention rule: timeline area J-AI must NEVER have borders)
Step 4: Apply black borders to header rows (error_prevention rule: header rows 1-5 must have black borders #000000)
Step 5: Set header row 5 background to light gray (from template.yaml backgrounds.header_row_5)
Step 6: Set task row heights to 21px (from template.yaml row_heights.task_rows)
Step 7a: Set sub-objective columns A-F to 40px (from template.yaml columns A-F)
Step 7b: Set separator column G to 10px (from template.yaml column G)
Step 7c: Set task number column H to 50px (from template.yaml column H)
Step 7d: Set task title column I to 280px (from template.yaml column I)
Step 7e: Set timeline columns J-AI to 25px each (from template.yaml columns J:AI)
Step 7f: Set owner columns AJ-AL to 80px each (from template.yaml columns AJ-AL)
Step 8a: Set title font size to 14px (from template.yaml fonts.project_title)
Step 8b: Make rows 1-2 bold (from template.yaml fonts.project_title and project_leader)
Step 8c: Center-align title row (from template.yaml fonts.project_title.alignment)
Step 9: Freeze header rows 1-5 (from template.yaml sheet.frozen_rows and error_prevention rule)

notes: AI followed the 'make_standard' sequence from sheet-actions.yaml
AI applied error_prevention rules: timeline=NONE, header=black, tasks=gray
AI used template.yaml for exact values: widths, heights, colors, fonts
Total actions: 16 — all generated from structured references, not guessed
